superhero.title: Supereroe
superhero.description: Trasformazione cinematografica in un supereroe originale.
superhero.prompt: Transform the person into an original cinematic superhero while preserving recognizable facial identity.

renaissance.title: Ritratto rinascimentale
renaissance.description: Trasformazione in un elegante dipinto rinascimentale.
renaissance.prompt: Transform the person into the subject of an elegant Renaissance oil portrait while preserving recognizable facial identity.

space_explorer.title: Esploratore spaziale

space_explorer.prompt: Transform the person into a futuristic space explorer while preserving recognizable facial identity.
